data.body:
make test collection error was ENV STALENESS: rebase pulled f943c7ef5 (parallelize gating suite w/ pytest-xdist); my pre-rebase venv lacked pytest-xdist -> xdist_group marker unregistered -> strict-markers collection error. NOT my code; CI has xdist. Fixed: pip install -e .[dev,agents] (pytest-xdist 3.8.0). Re-running make test bg41z10i1.
4214 unblock refused: its plan-review attestation went STALE after rebase+e4df (HEAD moved). Re-reviewing 4214 vs HEAD to re-sign, then transition blocked->in_progress.
